# Toddler Activity Finder

> A free interactive tool helping parents find developmentally appropriate activities for toddlers ages 2-5.

Built by [@meimakes](https://x.com/meimakes) — also writes [Raising Pixels](https://raisingpixels.dev), a newsletter about raising tech-native kids.

## What This Is

A single-page web app with 50+ curated toddler activities, filterable by:
- Skill category (motor, language, cognitive, sensory, social-emotional)
- Activity length (5, 10, 15+ minutes)
- Setup time (quick, some prep, plan ahead)
- Messiness level (clean, some mess, very messy)

## Tech

Static HTML/CSS/JS. No framework, no build step, no backend. Runs entirely in the browser.

- [Raising Pixels](https://raisingpixels.dev) — Newsletter on raising tech-native kids
